title: Youtube Poop: Link Cannot Find Credit
description:
I'm takin' story-based poops to the next level!

Someone tell me why I stopped pooping CD-i (no, don't). Still, I think this brings back the days of Link Goes Shopping. A peaceful time, where anything was possible.

So I saw the Norton's Furniture commercial and instantly thought of Senor Cardgage. So did everyone. But I thought of how to poop it, and I came up with (da-dada-daaaa!) CD-i.

I've employed some of my best techniques to make this poop as good as I could. We need more story-based poops. Now, seriously... if you can't find a story-based poop in my store... you can't find a story-based poop anywhere.

The song at the end is It's Not Easy To Be Me. I was going to have Link say the title so it would be more impactful, but I decided on the beginning
